text.tspan: LOG AGGREGATION: collect all logs from all services in all hosts
to a central searchable store. Without this, microservices = blind.
Fluentd / Fluent Bit / Vector / Filebeat / Promtail / OTel Collector
Reads: files, journald, stdout/stderr, Docker logs
Adds: host, pod, service, env metadata
Buffers: local disk if downstream is down
Routes: to one or many destinations
u2192 enables fanout to multiple sinks
Loki (Grafana, log streams keyed by labels; cheap)
AWS CloudWatch, Azure Log Analytics, GCP Cloud Logging (cloud)
S3 / GCS + Athena / Presto (long-term archive, cheap)
search by correlation_id, user_id, error keyword
dashboards on top errors, request distribution
